% --- Rule-of-three one-sided 95% upper bounds (pct) ---
% I1/I3 NOTE: \RuleOfThreeFourHundred (0.75% = 3/400) was formerly cited for E19';
%   E19' now reports genuine non-zero FP count so this bound no longer applies to E19'.
%   \RuleOfThreeSixHundred (0.50% = 3/600) is used for E8 precision (FP=0/600 benign events)
%   per the Clopper-Pearson one-sided 95% UB (identical to rule-of-three at 3 dec places).
\providecommand{\RuleOfThreeFourHundred}{0.75}
\providecommand{\RuleOfThreeFourFifty}{0.67}
\providecommand{\RuleOfThreeSixHundred}{0.50}
